# Veḷi · வெளி

> Open. Clear. Civic. — Tamil-first civic-technology platform for Sri Lanka's
> Northern Province, operated by Cloud Parallax (Pvt) Ltd.

Veḷi is a five-phase civic platform. Phase 1 — currently the only public
surface — is a Tamil-first navigator for everyday government procedures
(birth certificates, NIC, Samurdhi, pensions, etc.). Each procedure entry
is walked through against the actual office by a Veḷi field worker before
publication; the date of that walk-through is shown on every page as the
trust signal.

The platform also supports two future phases that are not yet public:
land-and-property documentation (Phase 2) and agricultural traceability
(Phase 3). All three product lines share one identity layer and one
three-tier verification model.

## Three-tier verification

Every document or claim carries an explicit tier. The platform never
inflates a lower tier into a higher one.

- self_asserted — uploaded by the user; no legal effect.
- community_corroborated — two or more named neighbours signed a witness
  statement; useful evidence but no legal effect.
- authority_attested — notary, lawyer, or government office attested;
  legal effect under Sri Lankan law.

## Public surfaces

- /procedures — list of published government procedures (Tamil-first;
  English secondary).
- /procedures/<slug> — single procedure detail with bilingual title,
  fee, last-verified date, source URL, step-by-step body content,
  and a Trust card with the legal disclaimer.
- /sitemap.xml — machine-readable index of every published procedure.
- /llms.txt — this file.
- /robots.txt — points to the sitemap.

## What this site is not

- Not a legal authority. Veḷi compiles procedure information; the
  office's word is final.
- Not a payment gateway. Citizens pay government fees in cash at the
  relevant office.
- Not a third-party messaging integration. Veḷi reaches users via the
  PWA, voice (IVR), USSD short codes, SMS short codes, and a trained-
  helper hotline — never through WhatsApp, Telegram, or similar.

## Locales

- Primary: Tamil (Jaffna register), code "ta"
- Secondary: English ("en"), Sinhala ("si")

## Authoritative source

The Veḷi implementation plan and design system live in the project
repository under docs/. The plan is the source of truth for which
procedures are in scope, when they were last verified, and what the
verification tier means in legal terms.

## Contact

Cloud Parallax (Pvt) Ltd — Jaffna, Sri Lanka.
